title: David Forster
compiled_truth: David Forster is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-19), David Forster sent 434 and received 1608 emails, totalling 2042 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (170), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (165), [Andy Zipper](people/andy-zipper) (61), [Bob Shults](people/bob-shults) (38), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (29). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, agency_com, archive, calendar, charges, deleted_items.
